title: danthonia nigricans
intro: Danthonia nigricans, also known as Black Needle Grass, is a perennial grass native to Australia and New Zealand. This plant is used in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Danthonia nigricans are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Danthonia nigricans can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
